bullets.text: Implemented SQL querying, storing, and filtering customizations and pins to ArcGIS maps using VueJS and ArcGIS endpoints increasing customer-efficiency and client satisfaction
Debugged 20+ Java-based Planon customizations by collaborating with several departments to improve data reliability and enable efficient cross-department collaboration
Implemented SQL querying, storing, and filtering customizations and pins to ArcGIS maps using VueJS and ArcGIS endpoints increasing customer-efficiency and client satisfaction
Debugged 20+ Java-based Planon customizations by collaborating with several departments to improve data reliability and enable efficient cross-department collaboration
Architected a Go microservice backend for a multi-tenant mobile CRM, designing a PostgreSQL schema to support full contact lifecycle tracking across multiple organizations from a single codebase
Built an async ingestion pipeline with a Redis job queue to handle contact data processing, enabling non-blocking operations and configurable business rules per tenant
Designed offline-first data sync architecture with conflict resolution logic, ensuring reliability for financial services teams operating in low-connectivity environments

Designed and built a full-stack scalable multilingual translation management system from scratch using ReactJS, API integrations, prompt engineering, and database design, enabling company employees to create, preview, and approve over 500 contents across several languages and dialects cost-effectively
Built and automated stale link detection across multiple wellness apps in Ruby on Rails, implementing parallelized link testing, rerouting handling, and daily scheduled jobs
Implemented SQL querying, storing, and filtering customizations and pins to ArcGIS maps using VueJS and ArcGIS endpoints increasing customer-efficiency and client satisfaction
Debugged 20+ Java-based Planon customizations by collaborating with several departments to improve data reliability and enable efficient cross-department collaboration
Implemented SQL querying, storing, and filtering customizations and pins to ArcGIS maps using VueJS and ArcGIS endpoints increasing customer-efficiency and client satisfaction
Debugged 20+ Java-based Planon customizations by collaborating with several departments to improve data reliability and enable efficient cross-department collaboration

Architected and built a real-time Resume Personalization web extension using React, TypeScript, WXT, and FastAPI, enabling users to dynamically tailor resume bullets to match job descriptions directly from their browser

Designed an asynchronous state synchronization architecture leveraging the Chrome Extension Storage API and background service workers to ensure non-blocking UI rendering and reliable data persistence across extension sessions

Developed an end-to-end AI pipeline utilizing the Google GenAI SDK and semantic embeddings to automatically analyze, chunk, and match candidate experience against targeted job description requirements

Engineered a multi-attempt validation and correction loop in Python that automatically edits tailored bullet points, checks them against fabrication and character-limit constraints, and falls back to original text if criteria are not met

Developed a recipe recommendation system using Python, Firebase, and Edamam, leveraging GPT for error handling and ingredient classification with NER (spaCy) and the FOBI ontology, enabling structured pantry organization, dietary analysis, and personalized recipe retrieval

Created and optimized REST APIs using python, FastAPI and BaseModel to manage complex JSON data from various APIs, enhancing backend functionality and ensuring seamless communication with multiple databases
Extracted, cleaned, transformed, and warehoused large volumes of data via API using Databricks, Apache Spark, Azure Cloud, and Azure SQL Pool to prepare data for insights
Built a dashboard using Tableau to display arrest statistics by area, time, and demographics, enabling better understanding of crime rates and potential arrest bias in the city
Built a member management tool using React and bootstrap that increased club efficiency drastically
Designed and organized educational curriculum and workshops
Recruited and interviewed new members, placing them into suitable projects to maximize contribution and learning
